While in a local [[Cantina/Legends|bar]], a '''moisture farmer''' who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="Jedi Academy" /> in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]]<ref name="Date">According to ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'', the events in the game take place ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which according to the ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' is placed in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> overheard a conversation about the [[Disciples of Ragnos]], a cult of [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] who were attempting to return the [[Death/Legends|dead]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Marka Ragnos]] to life. The [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]] told [[R5-D2]], their [[R5-series astromech droid]], to record the conversation. However, the farmer became fearful of reprisals from the cult and sold the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] to a clan of [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] before moving away.<ref name="Jedi Academy" />

==Behind the scenes==
The moisture farmer was mentioned in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'', which was released in [[2003]].<ref name="Jedi Academy" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1stm}}
